full_text:
Zhang Nan 張南
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Nan (張南). Claimed ability on the waters, but was just a braggart. Killed by Zhou Tai. Zhang Nan was affiliated with Yuan Shao, Yuan Xi, and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Nan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
